'''Altair 9''' was a dark, [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Altair system/Legends|Altair system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]], around the beginning of the [[Revanite crisis]], Altair 9 was [[Liberation of Klemark|attacked]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Following a ten-month siege, the planet's capital, [[Klemark]], was finally freed from [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Imperial]] control. The Republic subsequently provided food and other aid to the long-suffering people of the planet.<ref name="Mail Altair">{{TORcite|type=message|FWD: Republic Victory on Altair 9|M1-4X}}</ref>

Located on the edge of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] controlled by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], by the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the planet was involved in a small [[Battle of Altair 9|skirmish]] between the Republic and the Separatists. Fighting on the ground, [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] [[Jangotat|Alpha-98]] was attacked by a [[broca]] whilst fighting the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]].<ref name="TCD" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Altair|Altair]] is a well-known star in [[Wikipedia:Earth|Earth's]] own galaxy, and the use of this name in ''Star Wars'' can be compared to the references to [[Rigel VII]].
